title: Selection Event Schema
description: Shape of events emitted by the 3D Engine for selection / hover / focus / peel state changes. Consumed by UI. Owned by 3D Engine. Authority: Architect.

id.description: Primary anatomy-graph identifier of the targeted structure. UBERON preferred per ADR 0004.

screen_position.description: Where on the canvas the event occurred.

event_type.description: What kind of selection state change this event represents. Drives targets[] cardinality expectations (e.g. 'clear' has zero targets; 'select' has one).

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when the event was emitted by the 3D Engine.

targets.description: Zero or more structures involved. 'clear' has none; 'select' has one; 'multi_select_*' has the changed target.

shift.description: Shift was held during the event (commonly: multi-select extend).

alt.description: Alt/Option was held (modifier reserved for future use).

meta.description: Meta/Command was held (macOS analog of ctrl).

modifier_keys.description: Modifier-key state at the moment of the event. Omitted modifiers default to false; an entirely omitted modifier_keys object means no modifiers were held.

camera_intent.description: Whether this event implies a camera response.

preset.description: Anatomy-region-aware preset (per ADR 0001 consequences). Not a continuous slider.
